channel.title: Crime on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Crime on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple Crime Blotter Analysis
item.description:
Introduction to Apple Crime Blotter  

The Apple Crime Blotter is an occasional series that examines Apple-related crime. In this series, published on Apple Insider , various cases of Apple-related crimes are discussed, including stolen iPads, fake AirPods, and other Apple products. In this article, we will delve into the details of a recent case where a woman was bitten after her iPad was stolen, dozens of iPads were stolen from an elementary school, and a man was arrested for selling fake AirPods to police.
